questionHtml: The air is a mixture of nitrogen, oxygen and other gases. Explain why the component gases of air in the container have different average translational speeds.
markschemeHtml:
Average kinetic energy of the molecules is determined by the temperature only ✓

The mass of a molecule is different for each component gas ✓

From Ek=12mv2, the same Ek and different mass implies a different average velocity  ✓
